creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Could you please report it to upstream?

I re-checked the make test result and noticed that it does not cover jwt-decode.

The result are as follows:
PASS: jwt_new
PASS: jwt_grant
PASS: jwt_header
PASS: jwt_dump
PASS: jwt_encode
PASS: jwt_rsa
PASS: jwt_ec
PASS: jwt_validate
